title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 27 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 27 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 27 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/12/2024
Today, iron ore futures dropped significantly. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 759.5 yuan/mt, down 2.63% from yesterday.Traders showed weak willingness to sell, while steel mills made limited purchases. Market transaction sentiment was sluggish today.
